author: agreene
body: Good write-up. We should add the line about confirming receipt in writing so the company can't claim it was never filed.

author: shawn
body: Updated the Step 3 deadline to 15 working days to match the new contract language.

author: rdelgado
body: Can we break out the survey results by shift too? Second shift had very different overtime numbers.

author: tmitchell
body: Raw tallies are attached now. Skilled trades responses are at the bottom of the file.

author: mbell
body: This award is exactly what we need for the bypass case. I'll cite it in the brief.

author: carla
body: Booked the hearing room and confirmed the court reporter for the morning of the 14th.

author: shawn
body: Reminder to everyone: a member can refuse unsafe work without losing pay. Don't let supervisors bluff them.

author: bcarter
body: Added the same-shift reporting rule. Two members lost claims last year by waiting a day.

author: agreene
body: We should run a refresher on Weingarten at the next steward meeting. New folks keep missing it.

author: tmitchell
body: The script line for members is gold. Maybe print it on a wallet card for the floor.

author: mbell
body: Section 7.4 recall period is 24 months now, not 18. Please correct the summary.

author: shawn
body: I audited the March OT chart and found two bypasses in the press shop. Grievances filed.

author: rdelgado
body: Minutes look accurate. The food bank motion was 38 to 2, confirmed against my notes.

author: carla
body: The text-blast reminder system bumped attendance by about 20 people last meeting. Worth keeping.

author: shawn
body: Keep the card counts off the wiki entirely until we file for recognition. Organizing committee only.

author: bcarter
body: Clarified that members on honorable withdrawal owe no dues until recall. Good catch.

author: tmitchell
body: The 5-day bid window trips people up. Can we post a reminder near the time clocks?

author: agreene
body: Work-now-grieve-later is the right call. Only exception is genuine safety, which this page covers.

author: mbell
body: The seven tests framework wins hearings. I'd add a real example of disparate treatment.

author: shawn
body: Note to self: orientation packet rewrite is half done, finish the dues section tonight.
